## Description

<!-- Briefly describe what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New component
- [ ] 🔧 Enhancement (non-breaking change that improves existing functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Design token change
- [ ] 🔩 Headless primitive
- [ ] 🧪 Test update

## Component Checklist

<!-- If this PR adds or modifies a component, check all that apply -->

- [ ] `.razor` source file with Tailwind styling using design tokens
- [ ] Code-behind `.razor.cs` (if logic exceeds ~20 lines)
- [ ] Correct semantic HTML elements used
- [ ] ARIA attributes implemented where required
- [ ] Keyboard navigation implemented and documented
- [ ] Works in Blazor Interactive Server render mode
- [ ] Light mode and dark mode tested
- [ ] UX usage guidelines written (when to use, when not to, alternatives)
- [ ] Writing guidelines written (microcopy conventions)
- [ ] API reference documented (all parameters with types, defaults, descriptions)
- [ ] At least 3 usage examples (basic, common, advanced)
- [ ] Pixel-perfect Figma component created/updated
- [ ] All component states in Figma (default, hover, focus, active, disabled)
